name: Two-Tone PC
abilityText:
This card can only be used if you have 2 or more holomem on stage, each with only 1 color and is different color from each other.
Choose 2 of your holomem on stage each with only 1 color and is different color from each other. Reveal 1 1st holomem with the same color as each of the chosen holomem other than Buzz from your deck, and add them to hand. Then, shuffle the deck.
LIMITED：Usable only 1 per turn.
